add_params.name: tenantID
add_params.description: Tenant domain. Formatter reads from useSettings().currentTenant.

add_params.name: equipmentId
add_params.description: Equipment mailbox identity (from router query). PS1 uses for Set-Mailbox, Set-User, Set-CalendarProcessing, Set-MailboxCalendarConfiguration Identity.

add_params.name: streetAddress
add_params.description: PS1 Set-User param name is 'StreetAddress' but reads $MailboxObject.streetAddress (case-insensitive)

add_params.name: tags
add_params.description: Array of strings; formatter maps tag objects to .value strings

add_params.name: workDays
add_params.description: Comma-separated string of work days. Formatter joins array of {value} objects.

add_params.name: workingHoursTimeZone
add_params.description: Timezone standard name. Formatter unwraps autocomplete .value.

notes: customDataformatter outputs all fields with the same names read by the PS1, except: (1) autocomplete objects are unwrapped to .value strings (countryOrRegion, automateProcessing, workingHoursTimeZone); (2) tags array of {label,value} objects becomes array of strings; (3) workDays array of {value} objects is joined to comma-separated string. PS1 reads $MailboxObject.* directly with the camelCase names sent by the formatter.
x_cipp_warnings: customDataformatter is present on the CippFormPage for this endpoint. Form field names and/or types may be renamed or restructured before POST. Verify the transformer function in the frontend page file and correct param names/types accordingly.
